name: Aslam ibn Kathir
title: Companion of Azd
shortDescription: A brave Shia from the Azd tribe who sacrificed his life in support of Imam Hussain (AS).
fullStory:
Aslam ibn Kathir al-Azdi was a brave companion and sincere Shia. Along with other noble and perceptive Shias, despite many dangers, he reached Imam Hussain's (AS) camp in Karbala.

On Ashura, Aslam, with firm faith, defended the Master of Martyrs (AS) alongside the other companions. When Ibn Sa'd's army launched its general attack and thousands of arrows were shot towards the tents, Aslam shielded them with his chest.

He attained the great grace of martyrdom in that very first attack on Ashura (or after a brief fight). His sacrifice shows the deep penetration of the Prophet's (PBUH) and Amir al-Mu'minin's (AS) message among tribes like Azd.

His name is mentioned in sacred Ziyarats like Ziyarat al-Nahiya and Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya, remaining immortalized in history.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى أَسْلَمَ بْنِ كَثِيرٍ الأَزْدِيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Aslam ibn Kathir al-Azdi...
